title: narcissus stellatus
intro: Narcissus stellatus, also known as the Tazetta or winter aconite, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and early spring blooming period. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Narcissus stellatus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Narcissus stellatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
